flow_points: West Indies started strong, scoring 55 runs for 2 wickets in the Powerplay (RR 9.17).
SO Hetmyer anchored West Indies' innings, contributing 33.5% of the team's runs.
West Indies achieved a high-scoring finish in their Death Overs (RR 15.0), shifting match momentum.
Zimbabwe's chase began with early struggles, losing 3 wickets for 47 runs in the Powerplay (RR 7.83).
G Motie delivered a crucial spell of 4.0 overs for 28 runs, taking 4 wickets, sustaining defensive pressure (Impact 148.41).
AJ Hosein also bowled a crucial spell, taking 3 wickets for 28 runs in 4.0 overs.
Zimbabwe struggled under extreme chase pressure (Index: 89.0), leading to a late-innings collapse.
Despite the collapse, Zimbabwe recorded a high scoring rate in their Death Overs (RR 14.25) in a late attempt.
West Indies secured a decisive victory by 107 runs.
